title: A Letter to God — Summary
subject: English
notes: Lencho was a hardworking farmer who had strong faith in God.
His crop was destroyed by a hailstorm.
Lencho wrote a letter to God asking for money.
The postmaster and employees collected money to help him.
Lencho believed God had sent the money, but he suspected the post office employees had taken some of it.
summary: The story shows Lencho's deep faith in God. After a hailstorm destroys his crops, he writes a letter to God asking for help. The postmaster is moved by his faith and collects money for him. However, Lencho receives less than he asked for and thinks the post office employees are dishonest. The story highlights faith, innocence and irony.

qa.a: Lencho was a hardworking farmer who had deep faith in God.
